name: Meridian
description: Wireframe globes spinning in a dark atlas — each one shows a different meridian as it turns, tilting on its axis per redraw.

code.style: --rule: ( /* sphere and meridian share one emitted wire color and tilt */ --wire: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --mt: @r(-18deg, 18deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 14%; border: calc(20px / @Y) solid @var(--wire); border-radius: 50%; box-sizing: border-box; transform: rotate(@var(--mt)); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 14%; border: calc(20px / @Y) solid @var(--wire); border-radius: 50%; box-sizing: border-box; opacity: 0.75; transform: rotate(@var(--mt)) scaleX(@rand(0.12, 0.7)); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
